methods.description: Process for extracting total RNA from cells using TRIzol reagent, followed by purification steps to ensure RNA quality and quantity.

steps.description: Total RNA was extracted from the cells on days 7, 14, and 21 using TRIzol reagent according to the manufacturer recommendations.
steps.searchable_summary: extract total RNA from cells using TRIzol reagent

steps.description: To obtain pure RNA, additional steps including chloroform-induced phase separation, ethanol precipitation, and washing were involved.
steps.searchable_summary: purify RNA using chloroform phase separation and ethanol precipitation

steps.description: The RNA pellet was dissolved in 50 μL of diethylpyrocarbonate (DEPC) water and kept at -70°C.
steps.searchable_summary: dissolve RNA pellet in DEPC water and store at -70°C

steps.description: The quality and quantity of RNAs were determined by measuring the ratio of DNA optical density to protein optical density (A260/A280 Ratio) with NanoDrop 1000 Spectrophotometer.
steps.searchable_summary: measure RNA quality and quantity using NanoDrop spectrophotometer

methods.description: Procedure for synthesizing first-strand cDNA from extracted RNA using a cDNA Synthesis Kit.

steps.description: In the first step, a mixture of 1 µL random hexamer (2.5 ng/µL), DEPC water, and extracted RNA was prepared in a total volume of 12 µL and incubated at 65 º C for 5 minutes.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare and incubate RNA mixture with random hexamer at 65°C

steps.description: In the second step, a mixture of 4 µL 5X RT Buffer, 1 µL M-MuLV reverse transcriptase (100U/µL), 1 µL RNase inhibitor (20U/µL), 1 µL dNTP mix, and 1 µL DEPC water was prepared and added to the first step mixture.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare RT mixture and combine with RNA mixture

steps.description: Reverse transcription was performed using SimpliAmp Thermal Cycler as follows: 25°C (10 minutes) followed by incubation at 42°C (60 minutes) and 75°C (10 minutes).
steps.searchable_summary: perform reverse transcription using thermal cycler
